candidates.why: Direct top-line revenue label; preferred over duplicate total row.
Duplicate total revenue row; usable as fallback if primary row is missing in some years.

variables.notes: Both rows represent the same top-line amount. Ordered to prefer the more direct non-total label first.

candidates.why: Best matching cost of sales / direct production-service cost aggregate; subtotal of purchases, inventory change, and external services.
Only a component of direct costs, not full COGS.
Balancing row; should not be used.

variables.notes: Selected the full direct-cost bucket rather than a partial component.

candidates.why: Could be overhead-related in part, but it sits under Materials and Services, which is the COGS bucket here, so excluded from SG&A.
Operating overhead personnel cost line above operating result; good SG&A component.
Appears to be a component/alternate presentation of employee benefits for some years; useful as fallback coverage.
Explicit operating overhead bucket above operating result; good SG&A component.

candidates.row_label: Labor & Related Expenses in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: Explicit SG&A subcomponent, but likely already included within broader operating expense buckets; prefer broader buckets to avoid partial overlap issues.
Clear SG&A subcomponent, but likely included in Other Operating Expenses; not selected to avoid double counting.
Not an expense line and not from income statement; not suitable.

variables.notes: No single explicit SG&A total row exists. Selected broad overhead buckets above operating result. Included both 'Employee Benefit Expenses' and 'Employee Benefit Expenses - Other' as alternate labels across years for personnel overhead coverage. Excluded 'External Services' because it is presented within 'Materials and Services' (COGS), and excluded narrower subcomponents to reduce double counting.
No dedicated research and development expense line appears in the provided income statement preview.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest
candidates.why: Most direct and standard interest expense line; preferred.
Specific interest component, but narrower and positive-signed presentation suggests not the main total interest expense line.
Broader net finance measure; acceptable fallback if pure interest expense unavailable.
Broader than interest expense and includes non-interest finance items; fallback only.
Only a component of total interest expense.
Non-interest finance item; not preferred.
Other finance item / balancing-like residual; not preferred.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental duplicate of lease-liability interest component; not preferred.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest

variables.notes: Priority list uses the dedicated interest expense line first, then broader finance-cost fallbacks if needed in some years.

candidates.why: Only one component of equity, not total book equity.

final_choice.row_label: Equity attributable to equity holders of the Company total
